variants.label: Intent-first
variants.template: Users need to provide “{label}”{suffix}. Add a {component}.

variants.label: Implementation
variants.template: Implement {component} for “{label}”{suffix}. Treat this like it has to pass review.

variants.label: Design-system
variants.template: Add a reusable {component} for “{label}”{suffix}, consistent with a shared component library.

variants.label: Legacy integration
variants.template: We’re adding {component} to an existing page. Implement it for “{label}”{suffix} with minimal assumptions.

variants.label: Robustness
variants.template: Implement a {component} for “{label}”{suffix} that behaves sensibly across common edge cases.

variants.label: Debug / repair
variants.template: Create a {component} for “{label}”{suffix}. Assume previous attempts often get the basics wrong.

variants.label: Documentation example
variants.template: Provide an example {component} for “{label}”{suffix} as if it’s going into docs.

variants.label: Product copy request
variants.template: Add a {component} so someone can enter “{label}”{suffix}.
